speaker: rep
text: Hi, is this the purchasing department?

speaker: prospect
text: Yes it is, how can I help?

speaker: rep
text: We specialize in power dialers for outbound teams.

speaker: prospect
text: We've been evaluating a few vendors.

speaker: rep
text: Our platform delivers 4x more live conversations per hour.

speaker: prospect
text: What does the pricing look like?

speaker: rep
text: For your team size I'd recommend our Professional tier.
